typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-[1.1] font-bold
typography.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl tracking-tight leading-snug font-bold

motion_and_interactions.reveal_on_scroll: framer-motion: initial={opacity: 0, y: 20}, whileInView={opacity: 1, y: 0}, viewport={once: true}, transition={duration: 0.6}
motion_and_interactions.button_hover_primary: hover:bg-[#059669] hover:scale-[1.02] transition-all duration-300 text-white bg-[#10B981]
motion_and_interactions.button_hover_secondary: hover:bg-white/10 hover:scale-[1.02] transition-all duration-300 text-white border border-white/20
motion_and_interactions.hero_animation: Slow high-fidelity CSS/SVG animation of molecular structures forming & connecting. Loop.

Navigation.layout: Sticky top, z-50. Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A192F]/90 text-white. Flex between: Logo left, Nav links center (gap-8), CTA right. Bottom border border-white/10.
Navigation.components_used: Custom HTML/Tailwind, Framer Motion for mobile menu.

Hero.layout: min-h-[90vh] flex items-center relative overflow-hidden bg-[#0A192F] text-white
Hero.details: H1: 'Engineering the Future of Specialty Ingredients', sub: 'Advanced aroma chemicals...', dual CTAs. Overlay: background SVG animation of connecting nodes/molecules (opacity-20).

About_Timeline.layout: Grid 1 md:2. Left: About us text & 3 sub-bullets (Global Footprint, Proven Expertise, Future-Ready Scale). Right: Vertical timeline 1997 -> Present.

Products_Solutions.layout: Horizontal scrolling cards or CSS Grid for 5 categories. Each card has a hover effect revealing a molecular-structure watermark.
Products_Solutions.details: Categories: Aroma Chemicals, Specialty Ingredients, Phenol Derivatives, Natural-Identical Compounds, Custom Manufacturing.
Products_Solutions.components_used: Shadcn Card heavily customized, Framer Motion for hover

Industries_Bento.layout: Bento Box grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3. 5 items total. Span logic for asymmetry.
Industries_Bento.details: High-end abstract macro photography as background for each bento item. Overlay bg-black/40 for text contrast.

Manufacturing_Hotspots.layout: Full width image of Dahej facility with absolute positioned interactive pulsing hotspots (Reactions, Distillation, QC Lab).
Manufacturing_Hotspots.components_used: Custom HTML/Tailwind, Tooltip from Shadcn for hotspot info

Sustainability.layout: Deep emerald green background (#022C22). Grid 1 md:3 for pillars + large CTA section for report download.
Sustainability.details: Pillars: Eco-Conscious Manufacturing, Global Compliance, Responsible Sourcing. ISO/Compliance icons strip at bottom.

RnD_Innovation.layout: Split layout. Image of modern lab with structural formula SVG overlay on one side. Text on the other.

Contact.layout: Grid 1 md:2. Left: Location details (Mumbai HQ, Dahej). Right: Contact Form.
Contact.components_used: Shadcn Form, Input, Select, Textarea, Button

Footer.layout: Mega footer py-20 bg-[#0A192F] text-white/70. Grid 1 md:4. Large logo/brand name.

image_urls.description: Abstract blue and white art to use as a subtle dark overlay background in hero.
Close up bunch of leaves / herbs.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure strictly adhering to the #0A192F (Navy) and #10B981 (Emerald) color palette. Use the Outfit font for headings and Manrope for body text via the provided Google Fonts URL. The UI must exude high-end precision. Bento box industries section must use the macro images provided as backgrounds with a dark gradient overlay so text remains perfectly readable (APCA contrast compliance). For the SVG molecular animation, write lightweight inline CSS/SVG directly in the component. Utilize framer-motion heavily for the requested 20px reveal-on-scroll and the 300ms hover scales. Include `data-testid` on all buttons, forms, and interactive elements.
